title: Cycle Skipping With Missing Low Frequencies
summary: When low frequencies are missing, conventional high-frequency FWI can converge to a wrong local minimum.
assumptions: observed and synthetic events may differ by more than half a cycle
the user has not enabled a real execution backend

parameter_advice.frequency_band: Start from the lowest reliable frequency content; if it is absent, compare AWI or frequency extrapolation before high-frequency FWI.
parameter_advice.misfit_function: Consider AWI-style objectives when travel-time mismatch is too large for waveform-difference FWI.
